programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone suffers the consequences of pushing the tennis team too hard. Marcus divulges a new secret to Amara who clashes with Nate about new campus safety measures.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone struggles with a crisis as Thea returns to Bringston. Keisha goes to JR for advice, and Cam questions why she didn't come to him. Lando learns more about the history of KEK.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone must choose between the most important things in her life. Nate's cousin reaches out, which leads to a heart-to-heart with Lando. Keisha has a plan to help JR.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Nate urges Simone to tell Amara about her health. Marcus tries to bond with Noah. Cam wonders if Keisha and JR are spending too much time together.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Lando and Simone help each other see the best in themselves, which leads to Simone making a confession to someone important in her life.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone encounters an unlikely adversary. JR and Lando try to bring baseball back to Bringston. Cam makes a huge gamble. Keisha receives some news.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone and JR have new ideas about their futures. Cam and Keisha hit a crossroad in their relationship. Lando offers advice. Marcus holds a wellness event.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is determined to return to tennis as a champion, and Lando tries to help. Plus, Marcus spends more time with Noah, and Gabi joins Cam at the recording studio.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone faces one of the toughest matches of her career, and not everyone is on board with JR's choice for the club team. Keisha has a great idea, but needs Lando's help.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone opens up to Amara when her integrity is questioned; Damon returns and gives some sound advice to JR; Lando is sceptical about his future possibilities.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Exactly The Wrong Time To Get Proud

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Anything Short Of A Blow To The Head
programme.desc: As Ah Sahm and Young Jun struggle to produce authentic bills, they get valuable printing advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: While taking menacing steps to secure Nellie's land, Strickland instils confidence in Leary's political abilities. Hop Wei increase bill production, tensions rise between Young Jun and Ah Sahm.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Whiskey And Sticky And All The Rest Can Wait
programme.desc: As Sahm and Hong race against time to rescue Young Jun, Mai Ling hits rock bottom as Kong Pak suggests change may be due for the Long Zii.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: A Soft Heart Won't Do You No Favours
programme.desc: Desperate to generate money for the Hop Wei, Father Jun sets up a tense deal with German traders as Chao and Lee band together after an unexpected toss up threatens their lives.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Gotta Be Crooked To Get Along In A Crooked World

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: You Know When You're Losing The Fight
programme.desc: The Hop Wei and Long Zii unite for Mai Ling's wedding. Li Yong receives a grim warning from Kong Pak, Mosley and Lee inch closer to the truth. Bill makes a return to the police force.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: All Of Death Is A Going Home
programme.desc: Ah Sahm makes a bold sacrifice to protect Yan Mi, Mai Ling reckons with the consequences of her actions, and Leary reaches his breaking point.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: As the Secret Service finally corner the Tongs' printing operations, Ah Sahm must choose between his brothers in the Hop Wei and a future with Yan Mi.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Exactly The Wrong Time To Get Proud

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Anything Short Of A Blow To The Head
programme.desc: As Ah Sahm and Young Jun struggle to produce authentic bills, they get valuable printing advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: While taking menacing steps to secure Nellie's land, Strickland instils confidence in Leary's political abilities. Hop Wei increase bill production, tensions rise between Young Jun and Ah Sahm.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Whiskey And Sticky And All The Rest Can Wait
programme.desc: As Sahm and Hong race against time to rescue Young Jun, Mai Ling hits rock bottom as Kong Pak suggests change may be due for the Long Zii.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final BRI v CAR
programme.desc: A blockbuster Preliminary Final as Brisbane and Carlton battle it out for a place in the 2025 decider under lights in Springfield.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final NMT v MEL

programme.title: AFL: Richmond v Gold Coast
programme.desc: The undefeated Suns travel to Marvel Stadium, a venue Richmond haven't won at since 2021.

programme.title: AFLW: PF NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1999 R16 WC v FRE
Fox Footy Legends: Judd
programme.desc: Relive the best games and magic moments from the stars of our great game.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2005 SF SYD v GEE
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2018 GF WB v BRI
AFLW Grand Final Glory: 19 GF ADE v CAR
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 21 GF ADE v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 22 GF ADE v BRI
AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2023 GF NM v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2024 GF NM v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final BRI v CAR
programme.desc: A blockbuster Preliminary Final as Brisbane and Carlton battle it out for a place in the 2025 decider under lights in Springfield.

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: All of the 2025 Season 10 AFLW Awards, including the AFLW Best and Fairest, will be handed out.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Allison Gilson's son is tormented by a terrifying creature with 1000 teeth and a young boy makes an imaginary friend but discovers that it is not the only entity lurking in their new home.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Drivers are racing to deliver the last loads of the season before the ice melts away. On the Dalton, the load count race is too close to call as Jack and Darrell race neck and neck.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's halfway through the fifth fishing trip, and Caitlin Krause is no longer a greenhorn. She's passed her extended trial-period learning how to become an Icelandic deckhand.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Ardal O'Hanlon, Bridget Christie, Chris Ramsey, Judi Love and Sophie Duker battle to win the Taskmaster's golden head.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, an almost 100-year-old Model A filled with crickets needs a major overhaul to see its true potential; in Georgia, Knoxy and Wu aren't monkeying around.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Allison Gilson's son is tormented by a terrifying creature with 1000 teeth and a young boy makes an imaginary friend but discovers that it is not the only entity lurking in their new home.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: The origin of the sleuth and member of the Mystery Inc. gang, Velma.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Mircea Monroe and Gary Anthony Williams feature as special guests.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The bikers pull up a Mercedes for doing 175km/h in a 90km/h zone and it goes downhill from there. Then it's over to the usual phones, defects and illegal turns.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The day gets off to a rough start with a van fire on the highway. Then an apprentice spray painter's self-painted vehicle results in an unroadworthy vehicle, and a day of speeders.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Trouble on the traction line leaves Craig frustrated by endless breakdowns. A driver fights a back injury to keep the trucks moving, and a log hauler goes off the road forcing an all-night rescue.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes. Mary's locker reveals a sticky past, while Justin shows that he can turn a small investment into a big return.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily is faced with an all-male day in Paramount. Justin seeks Ivy's guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts, while Kenny immediately regrets speaking up during the auction.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Husband and wife truckers Nick and Jo risk one final supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The bikers pull up a Mercedes for doing 175km/h in a 90km/h zone and it goes downhill from there. Then it's over to the usual phones, defects and illegal turns.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The day gets off to a rough start with a van fire on the highway. Then an apprentice spray painter's self-painted vehicle results in an unroadworthy vehicle, and a day of speeders.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: An important trip for Darrell and Lisa's company runs into trouble and the fate of a distant village is on the line. At Polar, a costly mistake by Todd could cost them a government contract.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Husband and wife truckers Nick and Jo risk one final supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A group of prospectors search for gold in some of Australia's most secluded and inhospitable areas, facing danger as they seek their fortune.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette must test Noa's driving skills while Ceci helps Barb prepare for her new manager portrait.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette runs into an old friend and pretends to be a customer, not an employee, to avoid embarrassment.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: An important trip for Darrell and Lisa's company runs into trouble and the fate of a distant village is on the line. At Polar, a costly mistake by Todd could cost them a government contract.

programme.title: Test Day: The Ashes T1 D2
programme.desc: Day Two. The Aussies will want to strike back early after 19 wickets fell on a frenetic opening day.

programme.desc: The Thunder, coming off a convincing win hope to replicate the result against the second-placed Renegades.

programme.desc: Final round coverage of the QLD PGA begins from the Nudgee Golf Course in Brisbane.

programme.title: Golf: Australian PGA: QLD PGA FR
programme.desc: Final round coverage of the QLD PGA begins from the Nudgee Golf Course in Brisbane.

programme.title: USPGA: The RSM Classic Round 3
programme.desc: Third round action of the RSM Classic begins from the Sea Island Golf Club.

programme.title: Live: USPGA: The RSM Classic Final Round

programme.title: Live: USPGA: The RSM Classic Final Round
programme.desc: Final round action of the RSM Classic begins from the Sea Island Golf Club.

programme.title: 2002: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Peter Lonard and Jarrod Moseley were tied after 72 holes and after playing one hole of a sudden-death playoff, fading light meant that no further play was possible. They chose to share the title and not return the following day.

programme.title: 2002: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Peter Lonard and Jarrod Moseley were tied after 72 holes and after playing one hole of a sudden-death playoff, fading light meant that no further play was possible. They chose to share the title and not return the following day.

programme.title: 2004: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Peter Lonard shot a 7-under-par final round of 65 to take out the Australian PGA Championship at Coolum on Queensland's Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: 2005: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Robert Allenby won the 2005 Australian Pga Championship by one shot on Queensland's Sunshine Coast, beating Tasmanian Mathew Goggin.

programme.title: 2006: PGA Championship
programme.desc: Nick O'Hern clinched his first victory in seven years in dramatic fashion when he holed a bunker shot on the fourth play-off hole to beat Peter Lonard in the Australian PGA Championship in Coolum.

programme.title: 2006: PGA Championship
programme.desc: Nick O'Hern clinched his first victory in seven years in dramatic fashion when he holed a bunker shot on the fourth play-off hole to beat Peter Lonard in the Australian PGA Championship in Coolum.

programme.title: 2014: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Held at Royal Pines Resort, Greg Chalmers triumphed in a thrilling finish. Tied with defending champion and fellow Aussie Adam Scott, they faced a sudden-death playoff. Chalmers secured victory with a birdie on the first extra hole.

programme.title: 2014: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Held at Royal Pines Resort, Greg Chalmers triumphed in a thrilling finish. Tied with defending champion and fellow Aussie Adam Scott, they faced a sudden-death playoff. Chalmers secured victory with a birdie on the first extra hole.

programme.title: 2017: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Cameron Smith won the 2017 Australian PGA Championship at Royal Pines Resort, finishing at 19-under-par. This marked his first title at the event, showcasing his talent on home soil.

programme.title: 2017: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Cameron Smith won the 2017 Australian PGA Championship at Royal Pines Resort, finishing at 19-under-par. This marked his first title at the event, showcasing his talent on home soil.

programme.title: 2018: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: In 2018, The Australian PGA Champion was Cameron Smith, who successfully defended his 2017 title with a two-shot win.

programme.title: 2021: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Australian Jed Morgan created history when he won in 2021. Not only did he break the championship's biggest winning margin - previously eight shots held by Greg Norman, he also was the youngest winner of the tournamwent in 60 years.

programme.title: 2021: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Australian Jed Morgan created history when he won in 2021. Not only did he break the championship's biggest winning margin - previously eight shots held by Greg Norman, he also was the youngest winner of the tournamwent in 60 years.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Simon and Adity gave up city jobs to take on Simon's family home - a 700 year old castle up in Scotland. They've called in the team to take on some the castle's vast collection of antiques and manuscripts.

programme.title: Double the Money
programme.desc: As the challenge heats up, the twins host an event for local ladies in Leeds. Nissy and Ben offer a marriage webinar. On Bournemouth beach, a father and son run a hook-a-duck game.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the quarter-final and the remaining potters are making vintage style water filters that will be fired in their own oil drum kilns.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Ross and Margot's house is the odd one out, a '70s Spanish-style hacienda, nestled in beachside suburbia. The exterior is more Costa del Sol than Aussie coast, but what's beyond the doors will send buyers running.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Gus, 49, falls off a ladder; Daisy, 19, vomits blood after a recent tonsillectomy; Leonard, 93, is sent to resus after falling down stairs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Culzean Castle in South West Scotland, treasures revealed include a 1914 FA Cup medal, an Art Nouveau clock and a statue rescued from a compost heap.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Kiell Smith-Bynoe returns for Reduce Reuse Recycle week. The sewers make quilted bags from scraps, create new items from textile waste, and repurpose wedding dresses into party outfits.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: When Julienne saw her ramshackle mansion, it was love at first sight. For 17 years she battled to restore its crumbling beauty, but when her husband died she decided it was time to move on.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps newlyweds swap London for Surrey life with space for dogs and visits a community farm promoting wellbeing.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the castle, Fiona uncovers a Landseer dog portrait cut from a larger work and meets a giant rabbit in the Playful Garden.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Vika and Linda Bull have been part of the Australian music scene for over three decades. They've ridden the roller coaster as live musicians, but even a pandemic couldn't dull their joyous outlook on life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Phillip complete their tower suite kitchen; Anna and Edward launch French experience weekends; Alison and Zion prepare for their first wedding.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Frances made a rushed decision and bought her four-bedroom house five years ago. Since then she's realised it's way too big, worn-out and that she doesn't like it, so it's finally time for her to move on.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Jane Hall and Khanh Ong embrace Thailand with Bangkok luxury, river cruises, rooftop bars, Phuket beaches, spa rituals, and cooking classes.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps newlyweds swap London for Surrey life with space for dogs and visits a community farm promoting wellbeing.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 67-year-old man has fallen from his horse and been dragged 40m. Meanwhile, a 21-year-old plumber has an infected cyst on her bottom.

programme.title: Trouble with the Curve
programme.desc: Gus Lobel has been a top baseball scout for decades, but age has caught up with him. Enter Gus's estranged daughter, an ambitious attorney who joins him for one last recruiting trip.

programme.title: Trouble with the Curve
programme.desc: Gus Lobel has been a top baseball scout for decades, but age has caught up with him. Enter Gus's estranged daughter, an ambitious attorney who joins him for one last recruiting trip.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: Cat Person
programme.desc: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn't live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden.

programme.title: Vampires: The Turning
programme.desc: An American kickboxer in Thailand joins a gang of vampire slayers to rescue his lover from a bloodsucking warlord.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: An investigative team, armed with high-powered weaponry and a biting sense of sarcasm, must work together to defeat Black Lake's most ferocious resident: a 30-foot, prehistoric crocodile.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A security expert must infiltrate a burning skyscraper, 225 storeys above ground, when his family are trapped inside by criminals.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A security expert must infiltrate a burning skyscraper, 225 storeys above ground, when his family are trapped inside by criminals.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Deep-sea rescue diver Jonas must confront his fears to save a crew trapped on the ocean floor in a submersible that's been attacked by a massive creature.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Florida's coolest undercover cops hit the streets to take down a ruthless international drug cartel.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and the team are reacquainted with some familiar faces when investigating a suspicious suicide at the Brokenwood Women's Prison.

programme.title: Funny Woman
programme.desc: Sophie's got the gang back together, but it's not the same. Bill is distracted writing his novel, and Tony is not thrilled with shouldering the sitcom workload.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: A wanted man, the Jackal is on the run, desperate to get back to Nuria, but Bianca is given one last shot to bring the Jackal to justice.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Tomas finally has a new case, but with his mobility waning, has he lost his chance?

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: On stage and in front of many investors, Stephanie's speech is brutally interrupted by a power failure. Stephanie blames Simon and Toni, convinced they sabotaged her presentation behind the scenes.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: After a locksmith's murder, Billie recognises the victim and is forced to wrestle with her ethics. Vivienne pleads with her ex-husband to do the right thing.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The detectives turn to a rest home to find the murderer of a high-profile businessman, who has taken large amounts of money from the elderly.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: A wanted man, the Jackal is on the run, desperate to get back to Nuria, but Bianca is given one last shot to bring the Jackal to justice.

programme.title: Wolf Hall
programme.desc: As Wolsey retreats north, he urges Cromwell to get close to Anne Boleyn to regain the king's favour.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The detectives turn to a rest home to find the murderer of a high-profile businessman, who has taken large amounts of money from the elderly.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: A wanted man, the Jackal is on the run, desperate to get back to Nuria, but Bianca is given one last shot to bring the Jackal to justice.

programme.title: Wolf Hall
programme.desc: As Wolsey retreats north, he urges Cromwell to get close to Anne Boleyn to regain the king's favour.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labour revolt against the warden. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia, and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules, fleeing Oceanside.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: After a locksmith's murder, Billie recognises the victim and is forced to wrestle with her ethics. Vivienne pleads with her ex-husband to do the right thing.

programme.title: Mr. Mercedes
programme.desc: Alma and Morris zero in on a suspect. Jerome continues to make strides in the Rothstein case. Hodges shares his guilt over Lou's current situation with Ida. Lou's trial officially begins.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have found the perfect place to settle down and share a future: the bottom half of a beautiful old duplex. Their new home comes with an unexpected fixture.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Death by Design
programme.desc: A woman's twin sister is found strangled to death.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Tim Templeton suddenly finds his share of parental love plummeting when his new baby brother arrives - wearing a suit and toting a briefcase - and makes it clear to everyone that he's in charge. But when Tim discovers that Boss Baby is on a secret mission, he reluctantly agrees to team up with his pint-sized sibling for an epic adventure that might just change the world!

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Tim Templeton suddenly finds his share of parental love plummeting when his new baby brother arrives - wearing a suit and toting a briefcase - and makes it clear to everyone that he's in charge. But when Tim discovers that Boss Baby is on a secret mission, he reluctantly agrees to team up with his pint-sized sibling for an epic adventure that might just change the world!

programme.title: AfrAId
programme.desc: The Curtis family tests a new digital assistant, AIA, which learns their behaviours and anticipates needs. But AIA's protective nature means nothing, or no one, will interfere with them.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: Rewriting Trump
programme.desc: Filmed over a year, exploring the story of Trump's return to power through the lens of biographer and New York Times best-selling author, Michael Wolff.

programme.title: Rewriting Trump
programme.desc: Filmed over a year, exploring the story of Trump's return to power through the lens of biographer and New York Times best-selling author, Michael Wolff.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: Summer Camp
programme.desc: Follows three friends who used to spend every summer at a sleep away camp together. After years, when the opportunity to get back together for a summer camp reunion presents itself, they all seize it.

programme.title: Summer Camp
programme.desc: Follows three friends who used to spend every summer at a sleep away camp together. After years, when the opportunity to get back together for a summer camp reunion presents itself, they all seize it.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Champs, the Bellas found themselves split apart and jobless. But when they get their chance for one last tour, they come together again.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: Boy
programme.desc: A hoodlum father comes home to his son, who had created an elaborate myth around his dad's disappearance.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Two firefighters become domestic partners and must carry the masquerade to extremes when an overzealous bureaucrat becomes suspicious of their true relationship.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Two firefighters become domestic partners and must carry the masquerade to extremes when an overzealous bureaucrat becomes suspicious of their true relationship.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Left by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt had to raise himself. When he goes on a radio show and tells his story, it grabs the attention of the audience who try to help him find his family.

programme.title: Fat Pizza vs Housos
programme.desc: When a pizza chef is released from prison after 15 years, the only shop he can afford is in a housing commission suburb. Cult TV classics collide in this riotous tale.

programme.title: Fat Pizza vs Housos
programme.desc: When a pizza chef is released from prison after 15 years, the only shop he can afford is in a housing commission suburb. Cult TV classics collide in this riotous tale.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.
